name: Dinawan Energy Hub
notable: Hybrid wind+solar+BESS. Access rights: 707 MW wind + 300 MW solar + 300 MW/1,200 MWh BESS. Full vision ~2.5 GW. Adjacent to Transgrid Dinawan Substation. CIP holds option for minority interest. CIS Tender winner.

timeline.title: SW REZ access rights granted
timeline.detail: EnergyCo South West REZ access rights awarded — 4 projects, 3.56 GW total

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2029-12 to 2029-12-01 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

scheme_contracts.contract_type: CISA (federal underwriting) — capacity not disclosed in initial article

stakeholder_issues.detail: Spark Renewables (Tenaga Nasional Berhad subsidiary) has the project before the NSW Independent Planning Commission. Both T4 wind and T7 solar+BESS underwriting agreements depend on planning approval.

timeline_events.title: CIS Tender 4 underwriting — Stage 1 wind (357 MW)
timeline_events.detail: Dinawan Energy Hub Stage 1 wind component wins CIS Tender 4 underwriting (357 MW).

timeline_events.title: CIS Tender 7 underwriting — solar+BESS component
timeline_events.detail: Dinawan Energy Hub's solar+BESS component additionally wins CIS Tender 7 underwriting. Capacity not disclosed in the initial RenewEconomy article — refresh once DCCEEW publishes full numbers. Project remains awaiting IPC determination.

sources.title: Australia's biggest wind project among 19 winners (RenewEconomy)
